records.ety: [From New; cf. F. nounelles. News is plural in form, but is commonly used with a singular verb.]

defs: A report of recent occurrences; information of something that has lately taken place, or of something before unknown; fresh tidings; recent intelligence.
quotes: Evil news rides post, while good news baits.
It is no news for the weak and poor to be a prey to the strong and rich.

defs: A bearer of news; a courier; a newspaper.
quotes: There cometh a news thither with his horse.
